title: duvalia mastodes
intro: Duvalia mastodes, also known as the 'Stink Lily' or 'Devil's Ring', is a perennial succulent plant belonging to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Duvalia mastodes include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat these conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
